description.value:
Prerequisite: Personal Firearms Proficiency, Advanced Firearms Proficiency.

Benefit: The character makes attack rolls with the chosen weapon group (cannons, heavy machine guns, grenade launchers, or rocket launchers) normally.

Special: A character can gain this feat as many as four times. Each time, he or she selects a different weapon group.
